channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jason Edwards scores 18 points as Vanderbilt holds off No. 6 Tennessee 76-75
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Jason Edwards scored 18 points as Vanderbilt held off No. 6 Tennessee 76-75 on Saturday for the Commodores' second straight win.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US opens 2025 with 3-1 win over Venezuela in friendly missing regular starters
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — This camp for the U.S. men's national team is primarily about giving young players opportunities. And U.S. coach Mauricio Pochettino liked what he saw on that front Saturday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Caitlin Clark sits with Taylor Swift in suite at Chiefs game after past invitation
item.description: Caitlin Clark was seen in the same suite as Taylor Swift at Arrowhead Stadium during the Chiefs' divisional round playoff game against the Houston Texans
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Diego FC players react to first week of practice
item.description: The "Chrome & Azul" are back on the training ground to finish off their first week of training, for the first time ever as a club.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: West Virginia celebrates the life of NBA great Jerry West at sellout game with No. 2 Iowa State
item.description: West Virginia celebrated the life of NBA great Jerry West, the school’s all-time leading scorer, at its sellout game against No. 2 Iowa State, and announced at halftime that his No. 44 would be retired across all sports at the university.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: ESPN college basketball analyst Dick Vitale's return to broadcasting delayed by accident at home
item.description: Dick Vitale's return to broadcasting following cancer treatments will be delayed after the ESPN college basketball analyst had an accident at his Florida home. Vitale announced Saturday he will not be on the call for next Saturday's game between No.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Neal scores career-high 24 and Creighton snaps No. 14 UConn's 28-game home winning streak, 68-63
item.description: STORRS, Conn. (AP) — Jamiya Neal had a career-high 24 points to help Creighton snap UConn's 28-game home winning streak with a 68-63 victory on Saturday. The 14th-ranked Huskies hadn't lost at home since an 82-79 loss on Jan. 25, 2023, to then-No. 13 Xavier.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Neff injured in Red Rocks win over Iowa State
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The #4 Utah gymnastics team came away with an easy victory over Iowa State in its Big 12 Conference opener Friday night, but it came at a price.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 2-time Cy Young winner Jacob deGrom feeling normal after missing most of 1st two Texas seasons hurt
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Two-time Cy Young Award winner Jacob deGrom already has thrown off the mound this offseason and said everything felt normal after missing most of his first two seasons with the Texas Rangers because of elbow surgery.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Giants' Logan Webb makes 'Space Jam' reference in apparent reaction to Dodgers winning Roki Sasaki sweepstakes
item.description: The prized righty pitcher was one of the most sought-after international free agents in recent memory and picked the Dodgers over a considerable list of other suitors.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Jose Sharks center figures he’ll be traded without an extension
item.description: NHL trade deadline: San Jose Sharks Nico Sturm, a pending unrestricted free agent, might be on move before March 7
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Penguins' Nedeljkovic makes NHL history as he becomes 1st goalie with goal and assist in a game
item.description: BUFFALO, N.Y. (AP) — Alex Nedeljkovic remembers admiring the way Marty Turco and Martin Brodeur handled the puck during his childhood. On Friday night, he accomplished something neither of them — or any other goalie — had ever done.
item.dc:creator: JOE YERDON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-49er Dana Stubblefield to remain in prison for now after judge denies bail ruling
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (AP) — Former San Francisco 49er Dana Stubblefield, whose 2020 rape conviction was vacated late last year, will remain in California state prison for now after a judge declined to make a bail ruling Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: NFL selects Dolphins for inaugural game in Spain as league's international series continues to expand
item.description: The first-ever game in Spain is part of the NFL International Series, which will also include three games in London and one in Germany during the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Japanese ace Roki Sasaki to join Ohtani, Yamamoto with Los Angeles Dodgers
item.description: Prized Japanese pitcher Roki Sasaki says in an Instagram post he intends to sign with the World Series champion Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: San Diego FC hosts first ever practice
item.description: It was a warm welcome as San Diego FC reported to training camp Sunday, Jan. 12 surrounded by season ticketholders and support groups, taking the practice pitch for the very first time on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Julian Del Gaudio, Fox 5

item.title: Several Chicagoland AMC locations to air the College Football Playoff championship game
item.description: CHICAGO — Notre Dame will face off against Ohio State on Monday in the College Football Playoff championship game in Atlanta, and while traveling to the game may not be an option for some, fans in Chicago can still get a taste of the larger-than-life action at some AMC theaters.
item.dc:creator: Gabriel Castillo, WGN 9

item.title: Utah's struggles at home continue with 5-3 loss to Rangers
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club are having a difficult time during its longest homestand of the season. The New York Rangers scored three goals in the third period to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 5-3 at Delta Center on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Basketball: Rancho Buena Vista 56, La Costa Canyon 51
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-Girls Basketball on Wednesday evening part of girls and boys doubleheader for league action. Camille Dake, Senior from RBV lead the way for the Longhorns. Great game that ended with the home team winning 56-51.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC's youngest player having big impact
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Logan Cooley may only be 20 years old, but it is scary to think where the Utah Hockey Club would be without him this year. Cooley can't even drink legally, and he is second on the team in points with 12 goals and 25 assists.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: March Madness will pay women's teams under a new structure approved by the NCAA
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Women's basketball teams finally will be paid for playing games in the NCAA Tournament each March just like the men have for years under a plan approved Wednesday at the NCAA convention.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Girls Basketball: Mission Hills 73, Rancho Bernardo 33
item.description: Mission Hills known to be one of the top teams to beat in the county, and they proved to be so with a dominant 73-33 win over Rancho Bernardo.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: White Sox announce 16 signings in 2025 international class
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have agreed to terms with 16 international players, including two ranked in the Top 100 available prospects, Alejandro Cruz and Orlando Patiño, and other prospects with potential.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Ty Allred's insane buzzer-beater lifts CMU over Western Colorado
item.description:
Despite great defense from the Mountaineer defender, Allred stepped back and threw up a prayer for the win.
His prayer was answered.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Sammy Sosa to attend 2025 Cubs Convention, team announces
item.description: Former Chicago Cub and fan favorite Sammy Sosa will attend the 2025 Cubs Convention, the team announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Patrick and Brittany Mahomes welcome third child
item.description: Brittany Mahomes gave birth to the couple’s third child, a girl named Golden Raye Mahomes, on Jan. 12, the couple announced on social media.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: Bronco's season comes to an end following 31-7 loss to Buffalo
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Denver Broncos’ long-awaited playoff return ended Sunday in Upstate New York. After eight years away from the postseason, the Broncos found themselves in the spotlight, led by rookie quarterback Bo Nix.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Coaching Tracker: The Bears' search to find their next head coach
item.description: The Chicago Bears have assembled a six-person panel to find their next head coach, with Ryan Poles as the final decision-maker, and have requested to interview Joe Brady, Thomas Brown, Matt Campbell, Pete Carroll, Brian Flores, Marcus Freeman, Aaron Glenn, Joe Brady, and David Shaw.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: New England Patriots hire former Super Bowl champ Mike Vrabel as next coach
item.description: Vrabel, a fan favorite during eight seasons as a player in New England where he was a member of its first three Super Bowl winners and an inductee into the team’s Hall of Fame in 2023, was the preferred candidate because of his long association with the franchise and coaching success.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
